testCases.title: Verify Agent Responds to Valid Input
testCases.description: Test if the agent provides correct responses to valid user input
testCases.preconditions: User should be on the agent interaction page

steps.action: Pre-condition: User should be on the agent interaction page
steps.expectedResult: Agent interaction page should be displayed

steps.action: Enter a valid question or command
steps.expectedResult: Agent should understand the input

steps.action: Wait for agent's response
steps.expectedResult: Agent should provide the correct account balance

expectedResults: Agent should respond accurately to valid input

testCases.title: Verify Agent Handles Invalid Input Gracefully
testCases.description: Test if the agent provides guidance when invalid input is given
testCases.preconditions: User should be on the agent interaction page

steps.action: Pre-condition: User should be on the agent interaction page
steps.expectedResult: Agent interaction page should be displayed

steps.action: Enter an invalid or unclear input
steps.expectedResult: Agent should detect invalid input

steps.action: Wait for agent's response
steps.expectedResult: Agent should provide guidance or clarification options

expectedResults: Agent should handle invalid input gracefully

testCases.title: Verify Agent Performs Task Completion
testCases.description: Test if the agent completes tasks based on user commands
testCases.preconditions: User should be on the agent interaction page

steps.action: Pre-condition: User should be on the agent interaction page
steps.expectedResult: Agent interaction page should be displayed

steps.action: Enter a command to perform a task
steps.expectedResult: Agent should understand the command

steps.action: Wait for agent to complete the task
steps.expectedResult: Agent should complete the task successfully

expectedResults: Agent should complete user tasks without errors

testCases.title: Verify Agent Maintains Conversation Continuity
testCases.description: Test if the agent remembers context during a session
testCases.preconditions: User should be on the agent interaction page

steps.action: Pre-condition: User should be on the agent interaction page
steps.expectedResult: Agent interaction page should be displayed

steps.action: Enter a question to start a conversation
steps.expectedResult: Agent should respond with account balance

steps.action: Enter a follow-up question related to the previous response
steps.testData: Question: 'Can you show me the last 5 transactions?'
steps.expectedResult: Agent should remember context and respond correctly

expectedResults: Agent should maintain context throughout the session

testCases.title: Verify Agent Availability and Responsiveness
testCases.description: Test if the agent is available and responds promptly
testCases.preconditions: User should be on the agent interaction page

steps.action: Pre-condition: User should be on the agent interaction page
steps.expectedResult: Agent interaction page should be displayed

steps.action: Enter a valid question or command
steps.expectedResult: Agent should respond promptly

steps.action: Repeat the input multiple times to check responsiveness
steps.expectedResult: Agent should remain responsive and provide consistent responses

expectedResults: Agent should be consistently available and responsive

testCases.title: Verify Agent Handles Edge Cases for Input
testCases.description: Test if the agent handles edge cases like empty input or special characters
testCases.preconditions: User should be on the agent interaction page

steps.action: Pre-condition: User should be on the agent interaction page
steps.expectedResult: Agent interaction page should be displayed

steps.action: Enter an empty input
steps.expectedResult: Agent should detect empty input and prompt for valid input

steps.action: Enter special characters as input
steps.expectedResult: Agent should detect invalid input and provide guidance

expectedResults: Agent should handle edge cases gracefully

testCases.title: Verify Agent Handles Session Timeout
testCases.description: Test if the agent handles session timeout correctly
testCases.preconditions: User should be on the agent interaction page

steps.action: Pre-condition: User should be on the agent interaction page
steps.expectedResult: Agent interaction page should be displayed

steps.action: Start a conversation with the agent
steps.expectedResult: Agent should respond correctly

steps.action: Wait for the session to timeout
steps.expectedResult: Agent should display a session timeout message

steps.action: Attempt to interact with the agent after timeout
steps.expectedResult: Agent should prompt user to start a new session

expectedResults: Agent should handle session timeout appropriately
